title: DA-Code: Agent Data Science Code Generation Benchmark for Large Language Models
abstract: We introduce DA-Code, a benchmark for evaluating LLM agents on complex data science tasks including data wrangling, machine learning, and exploratory data analysis. DA-Code contains 500 tasks evaluated in a Docker-based sandbox. The best models achieve only 30.5% accuracy, revealing significant gaps in data science code generation capability.

claims.statement: Experiments show that although the baseline performs better than other existing frameworks, using the current best LLMs achieves only 30.5% accuracy, leaving ample room for improvement.
Experimental results indicate that model performance decreases with increasing difficulty, validating our grading approach.

commands: docker run da-code python evaluate.py --model gpt-4 --split test
